headline: Snowflake Aims To Become Core AI Data Hub For Financial Services
summary: Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) is leading a new Financial Services Working Group under the Open Semantic Interchange initiative, announced at Snowflake Summit 26. The initiative targets standardized, AI-ready data semantics for financial institutions and other highly regulated sectors. New collaborations with Cognizant, Collibra, AtScale, Northern Trust, Thomson Reuters and others were unveiled to support governed, interoperable AI and agentic workflows. For investors tracking NYSE:SNOW, this move...
